label: Landing hero
text: Crypto research is broken. Five tabs open, three explorers, two dashboards, and you still miss the move. This is AlphaForge AI — a multi-agent crypto alpha and bot forge, powered by MiMo V2.5 Pro.

label: Live stats
text: One terminal. Three chains. Eighteen features. Real numbers, not mockups. Two point four million signals processed. Eight thousand bots forged. Two hundred eighteen billion tokens consumed across the runtime.

label: Signal Forge
text: This is Signal Forge. Type a ticker, and seven specialist agents reason in parallel — momentum, liquidity, narrative, on-chain, risk, verdict, and forge. The output is a verdict, a conviction score from zero to one hundred, a thesis, and an entry, target, and invalidation level.

label: Scanner Hub
text: Scanner Hub. Four scanners in one page. Token deep-dives. X sentiment scoring. Project alpha audits. And DeFi yield surfacing. Every result is a real model call, not a lookup.

label: Backtest Lab
text: The Backtest Lab takes any strategy and runs it against price-series-style returns. Equity curve versus HODL. Drawdown. Sharpe. Win rate. Four strategies built in, including the multi-agent default.

label: AI Terminal
text: The AI Terminal is free-form streaming chat with the runtime. Multi-turn, context-aware. The same agents respond. Ask it anything — token deep-dive, gas conditions, narrative heat — it picks the right tools and streams the answer back.
type_text: Give me a deep-dive on JUP narrative heat

label: Webhook Alerts
text: Webhook Alerts. Set a price level, a verdict change, or a volume spike. Route it to Telegram, Discord, a webhook, or email. The manager tracks every trigger and gives you a full audit trail.

label: Portfolio Tracker
text: Portfolio Tracker. Plug in your positions, get live prices, computed profit and loss, and an allocation pie. All client-side. No account, no key, no data leaving the browser.

label: Strategy Builder
text: Strategy Builder. Drag conditions together. Combine with AND-OR logic. Export the strategy as JSON or push it straight to the Backtest Lab. Plain English in, executable workflow out.

label: Trade Router
text: The Trade Router simulates multi-DEX swaps across Ethereum, Base, Solana, and Arbitrum. It returns hops, gas, price impact, and a per-DEX quote board. See exactly which venue routes your capital best, before you commit.

label: Custom Agents
text: Custom Agents. Build your own sub-agent. Give it a name, a role, a system prompt, and a model. Test it live against the runtime. The agents you create plug into the same orchestrator the core stack uses.

label: Dashboard
text: Operator surfaces. Sign-in, register, and a unified dashboard. Credits, active agents, signals in the last twenty-four hours, and a full activity feed. One pane of glass for everything you operate.

label: Billing
text: Billing. Three tiers — Free, Pro, and Team. Invoice history. Real plan switching. The whole monetization layer is wired and ready for Stripe to drop in.

label: API Keys
text: And scoped API keys. Generate a key, scope it to read signals or execute trades, reveal it once, revoke it any time. Drive AlphaForge from your own bot, your own backend, your own pipeline.

label: Close
text: Under the hood, every reasoning surface routes through MiMo V2.5 Pro. An active operator burns about eighty million tokens a day. AlphaForge is for the operator who treats crypto like a system, not a vibe. Powered by MiMo. Live now at alphaforge dash ai dash sigma dot vercel dot app.
